command:
export PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1; export PYTHONPATH=/tmp/olmo-train-runtime-deps-rl-dece6a8/73e31d126912e3dcfdbca554/userbase/lib/python3.12/site-packages:/tmp/open-instruct-runtime:/tmp/OLMo-core-runtime/src:${PYTHONPATH:-}; python - <<'PY'
import importlib.metadata
import importlib.util
from packaging.requirements import Requirement

missing = []
for raw in importlib.metadata.requires('vllm') or []:
    requirement = Requirement(raw)
    if requirement.marker is not None and not requirement.marker.evaluate():
        continue
    module = requirement.name.lower().replace('-', '_')
    if importlib.util.find_spec(module) is None:
        missing.append(raw)
print('MISSING_VLLM_REQUIREMENTS')
for item in missing:
    print(item)
PY
